articles.title: 26 Crypto Platforms Drop Support for XRP in Wake of SEC’s Ripple Lawsuit
articles.description: A growing list of crypto platforms are rescinding support for XRP as Ripple prepares for a legal battle with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Analyst Leonidas Hadjiloizou has compiled a list of 26 companies that have changed their policies surrounding XRP in response to allegations that the asset may be an unregistered security. […]

articles.title: Binance’s $10M Endorsement Leads to 90% Surge For Polkadot (DOT)
articles.description: Polkadot (DOT) surged more than 90 percent in one week following a $10M endorsement and front page listing from leading cryptocurrency exchange Binance.

articles.title: IOTA Co-founder Schiener Considers Partnership and Bridge to Cardano
articles.description: The IOTA Foundation is placing primary focus on developing bridges to ETH and other ecosystems. IOTA co-founder Dominik Schiener revealed their aim through Discord on December 30, 2020. Regarding the possibility of developing a post-phase 2 ERC-20 migration tool from Chrysalis, as IOHK is doing for Cardano, Schiener said that this is part of aRead More

articles.title: XRP enthusiasts seek to force White House’s hand on SEC suit
articles.description: A longshot effort from the community hopes to solicit an official White House response

articles.title: Polkadot’s (DOT) Price and Tweet Volume at All-time High Levels
articles.description: Quick take: Polkadot has silently risen to the number 6 spot on Coinmarketcap Its value recently hit an all-time high and could repeat it in the days to follow Polkadot’s tweet volume is also at all-time high levels as investor interest grows The digital asset of Polkadot (DOT) has had an eventful past week in the crypto markets by almost doubling in value since the 25th of December. articles.title: Ripple receives first XRP installment of 2021
articles.description: Ripple has received its first installment of 1 billion XRP in 2021 from its escrow as per the distribution model it had announced. Interestingly, the firm did not receive a full 1 billion XRP, but 900 million. The crypto movement tracker on Twitter – Whale Alert, informed the community of the released fund in three […]

articles.title: XRP Community Launches Petition to The White House to Deem XRP a Currency
articles.description: XRP community have launched a petition to the US federal government, requesting for an official recognition of XRP as a currency

articles.title: Celsius Network confirms ADA will be added in Q2 2021
articles.description: Cryptocurrencies surged in the past year, as market participants recorded sizeable returns and mainstream adoption increased significantly. Crypto rewards platforms too benefited from these developments, noting record high-interest payments to clients on numerous cryptocurrencies deposited. Rewards platform, Celsius Network announced earlier today that it will be adding Cardano [ADA] to the...
